emails.subject: Re: Update
emails.body: Re: Update How about this Friday, Nov. 12 at 2 pm? Sara David P Dupre 11/10/99 10:16 AM

emails.subject: update
emails.body: update Cargill said that we do not have a line of credit nor do we have money sitting in an account with them. The account is inactive at this time. Let's review our next step when you have an opportunity. Thanks David

emails.subject: Re: update
emails.body: Re: update What were the dollar amounts on the printout that you sent to me? David P Dupre 05/24/2000 06:06 PM
